narrative: Middle East escalation drives crude volatility and a geopolitical risk premium — USD/JPY firms to 157.24 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage offsets marginal risk-premium flows; gold lower -0.13% near $4,528; equities -0.41%; DXY +0.33%; VIX 18.3. Dollar bids firm as Iran tensions lift yields, while EUR/USD retreats to 1.1693 on a +175bp Fed-ECB differential. Watch the RBA Rate Decision at 04:30 UTC for war-driven inflation signals.
